description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on pull requests, pushes, and published releases. Use an ubuntu-latest job matrix with gcc and clang compilers and Release and Debug configurations. Check if a workflow run can be skipped due to duplicate actions, then for each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up ccache, install dependencies, configure CMake, compile dependencies and the OSP-Magnum project, run unit tests, and upload the build artifacts.
